incident.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of Gradle than 9.2.1 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 34 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.11.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.core:core-splashscreen than 1.0.1 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.plugin.serialization than 1.9.0 is available: 2.3.20
A newer version of io.github.jan-tennert.supabase:bom than 2.4.3 is available: 3.5.0
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-android than 2.3.11 is available: 3.4.3
A newer version of io.ktor:ktor-client-core than 2.3.11 is available: 3.4.3
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json than 1.6.3 is available: 1.11.0
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
Must use `app:tint` instead of `android:tint`
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/kime_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.KimeSeminar`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/kime_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.KimeSeminar`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/kime_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.KimeSeminar`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?attr/selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.KimeSeminar`)
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?

fix-composite.description: Replace with the edit extension function
fix-composite.family: Replace with the edit extension function

incident.message: Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Hardcoded string "Forgot password illustration", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Reset Password", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Kami akan mengirimkan link reset ke email Anda", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Email Terkirim! ✅", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Kami telah mengirimkan link reset password ke:", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "⏱️ Link akan berlaku selama 24 jam. Jangan lupa untuk cek folder SPAM jika email tidak muncul.", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "KEMBALI KE LOGIN", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Masukkan Email Anda 📧", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Kami akan mengirimkan link reset ke email Anda", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Email", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "KIRIM LINK RESET", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "← Kembali ke Login", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "📋 Data Pribadi", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Nama Lengkap *", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Email *", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Nomor HP (08xxxxxxxxxx) *", should use `@string` resource
